=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/newSchemaClass_preview.ts(7,28): suggestion TS377094: This Schema class is constructed with `new`. `User.make(...)` can be used to construct the Schema class instance. effect(newSchemaClass)


==== /.src/newSchemaClass_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics newSchemaClass:suggestion
    import { Schema } from "effect"
    
    class User extends Schema.Class<User>("User")({ name: Schema.String }) {}
    
    export const preview = new User({ name: "John" })
                               ~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377094: This Schema class is constructed with `new`. `User.make(...)` can be used to construct the Schema class instance. effect(newSchemaClass)
